name: Honey-Style Roasted Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons Olive oil or vegetable oil
4 medium Potatoes, unpeeled, cut into 1 1/2-inch chunks
2 medium Carrots, cut into strips (about 1 to 1 1/2 cups)
1 medium Green bell pepper, cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. In a large bowl, combine the olive oil or vegetable oil, seasoned salt, marjoram, and pepper; mix well. Add all remaining ingredients; toss to coat evenly.
2. Spread the vegetables on an ungreased baking sheet in a single layer. Bake at 450 degrees for 20 minutes.
3. Turn and stir the vegetables, then bake an additional 20 to 25 minutes or until they are tender.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
150 Calories, 4 g Fat, 230 mg Sodium
